/usr/bin/c++  -pthread   CMakeFiles/rknn_yolov8_demo.dir/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/rknn_yolov8_demo.dir/postprocess.cc.o CMakeFiles/rknn_yolov8_demo.dir/yolo_detector.cc.o CMakeFiles/rknn_yolov8_demo.dir/rknpu2/yolov8.cc.o  -o rknn_yolov8_demo  -Wl,-rpath,/home/cat/RK3588_yolov8detect_cpp/cpp/3rdparty/rknpu2/Linux/aarch64:/usr/local/lib utils.out/libimageutils.a utils.out/libfileutils.a utils.out/libimagedrawing.a ../3rdparty/rknpu2/Linux/aarch64/librknnrt.so /usr/local/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.10.0 -ldl ../3rdparty/jpeg_turbo/Linux/aarch64/libturbojpeg.a ../3rdparty/librga/Linux/aarch64/librga.a /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.10.0
